title: Thrivecart checkout block not displaying on published page
symptom: The Thrivecart checkout block is visible in the editor and preview but not on the published page. Inspecting the page reveals an iframe not found error.
not_this_if: The issue occurs only in the editor or preview mode
root_cause: The Thrivecart embed script may not be properly loaded on the published page, leading to the iframe not being created or recognized. This can happen if the script is not executed correctly during the page load.
fix_steps: Remove any existing Thrivecart embed code from the page.
Add the provided script snippet into an on-page load workflow.
Ensure the script is executed when the page loads.
agent_instruction: Implement the provided script in an on-page load workflow to ensure the Thrivecart embed loads correctly.
